summary: Completed testing of Robots Dashboard frontend and verified backend APIs. All tests passed - admin login to /saas-admin, navigation to /robots via 'الروبوتات الذكية' button, robot dashboard with 3 robot cards, stop/start all buttons, manual run and restart buttons, tenant login still working.
critical_code_review_comments: RobotsPage.js properly implements all data-testid attributes for testing
All 3 robot cards (inventory, debt, report) display correctly with status badges, stats, and action buttons
Stop/Start all buttons toggle correctly based on is_running state
Overview cards show system status, active robots count, total checks, and start time
Navigation from SaasAdminPage to /robots works via 'الروبوتات الذكية' button
ProtectedRoute correctly allows super_admin access to /robots
context_for_next_testing_agent: Robots Dashboard frontend fully tested. All UI elements working: robot cards with stats, status badges (يعمل/متوقف), manual run buttons (تشغيل يدوي), restart buttons (إعادة تشغيل), stop all button (إيقاف جميع الروبوتات), start all button (تشغيل جميع الروبوتات), refresh status, toggle auto-refresh. Backend robot APIs confirmed working - 17/17 pytest tests passed.

overview_cards.overview_status: PASS - Shows حالة النظام with يعمل/متوقف status

global_controls.stop_all_btn: PASS - Stops all robots, system status changes to متوقف
global_controls.start_all_btn: PASS - Starts all robots, system status changes to يعمل

mocked_apis.SMS_Service: MOCKED - Logs to console and database but does not send actual SMS
mocked_apis.Email_Service: Falls back to logging if SendGrid API key not configured
